categories.financial: Revenue, expenses, margins, and budget data
categories.customers: Customer demographics, segments, and lifetime value
categories.sales: Sales transactions, pipelines, and lead sources
categories.feedback: Customer surveys, reviews, and support tickets
categories.products: Product catalog, features, and usage data
categories.operations: Operational KPIs, logistics, and process data
categories.strategic: Board decks, OKRs, and strategic plans
categories.unknown: Data that does not fit any known category
